---
title: "Contact"
format: html

---
**Email:**
<a href="mailto:danmarris@outlook.com">danmarris@outlook.com</a>

**LinkedIn:** <a href = "https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-marris-7a1133194/">Homepage </a>

See below for a (not so) recent CV (updated Feb. 2025):

<iframe src="images\\Marris_CV.pdf" width="80%" height="900px">
</iframe>
